chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1648 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 11.03.2020 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Counsel for petitioner submits that alleged detenu has returned home safely. In the view of above development, counsel for petitioner does not press this petition; the same is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
